untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification criteria 'EADT' (Exact pattern name not fully stated) cannot be operationalized with available indicators. The specific candlestick/price action pattern recognition rules are not provided in the source text. translation_notes: Translated bear market preference into TRENDING_DOWN regime filter, as bear market context is more reliable per source. Used standard 5% stop-loss based on 5% failure rate in bear markets (lower bound). Exit condition set as reversal above SMA_20 as a reasonable mean-reversion trigger when pattern fails. Success rates and average decline percentages could not be incorporated as they are author-silent. The core pattern recognition mechanism requires manual visual identification and cannot be fully automated with the available quantitative indicators.
